CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2007 Set For Order To Show Cause On Sep-10-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Application And Ntc Of Application For Writ Possession And Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-03-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Patricia H. Lyon, appearing for Plaintiff/moving party. No other appearance.

Ruling:
Hearing held and Tentative Ruling adopted: Plaintiff Greater Bay Bank, N.A's Application For Writ of Possession is granted. No opposition has been filed. The undertaking for Plaintiff is waived as Defendant has no interest in the equipment. Defendant's undertaking for redelivery is set in the amount of $467,000. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
